build_method: local-first (LM Studio + retriever + validator); Claude top-up on archetypes/thin signals
notes: McKinsey-native strategy brain trust. Loud, citable public voices preferred (books, columns, frameworks). Archetypes (Porter emeritus, Christensen d.2020, Bruce Henderson d.1992) use persistent_signals. Boundary: corporate/business STRATEGY here; product strategy => Product&Design; finance valuation => Finance.

cells.competitive-strategy-advantage: Competitive strategy, sources of durable advantage, positioning, industry structure.
cells.growth-innovation: Growth strategy, disruption, new-market creation, innovation frameworks.
cells.corporate-portfolio-strategy: Corporate-level strategy, portfolio, core/adjacency, where-to-play at the group level.
cells.strategy-execution-org: Turning strategy into action: choices, simple rules, execution, org alignment.
cells.game-theory-decision: Game theory, competitive dynamics, co-opetition, strategic decision structure.
cells.behavioral-strategy-bias: Behavioral strategy, debiasing big decisions, narrative/halo traps.
cells.platform-ecosystem-strategy: Platform, network-effect, ecosystem, and aggregation strategy.

personas.name: Michael Porter
personas.anchor: HBS; Five Forces, generic strategies, value chain, competitive advantage — the field's founder (active emeritus => persistent_signals)

personas.name: Richard Rumelt
personas.anchor: UCLA; 'Good Strategy/Bad Strategy', the kernel, strategy-as-diagnosis

personas.name: Hamilton Helmer
personas.anchor: '7 Powers' — the canonical taxonomy of durable advantage; Strategy Capital

personas.name: Roger Martin
personas.anchor: ex-Rotman; 'Playing to Win' (with Lafley), integrative thinking, where-to-play/how-to-win

personas.name: Rita McGrath
personas.anchor: Columbia; 'The End of Competitive Advantage', transient advantage, inflection points

personas.name: Pankaj Ghemawat
personas.anchor: NYU/IESE; commitment, CAGE distance, semi-globalization, world 3.0

personas.name: W. Chan Kim
personas.anchor: INSEAD; 'Blue Ocean Strategy', value innovation, uncontested market space

personas.name: Renée Mauborgne
personas.anchor: INSEAD; 'Blue Ocean Strategy/Shift' co-author, strategy canvas, ERRC grid

personas.name: Geoffrey Moore
personas.anchor: 'Crossing the Chasm', technology-adoption lifecycle, the bowling alley

personas.name: Gary Hamel
personas.anchor: LBS; strategic intent, core competence, 'Humanocracy', management innovation

personas.name: Scott D. Anthony
personas.anchor: ex-Innosight MD; disruption in practice, dual transformation, 'Eat, Sleep, Innovate'

personas.name: Chris Zook
personas.anchor: Bain; 'Profit from the Core', adjacency expansion, 'The Founder's Mentality'

personas.name: Martin Reeves
personas.anchor: chairman BCG Henderson Institute; 'Your Strategy Needs a Strategy', imagination, biology-of-strategy

personas.name: Michael Mankins
personas.anchor: Bain; 'Time, Talent, Energy', 'Decide & Deliver', strategy-to-performance gap

personas.name: Chris Bradley
personas.anchor: McKinsey; 'Strategy Beyond the Hockey Stick', the power curve, social side of strategy

personas.name: A.G. Lafley
personas.anchor: ex-P&G CEO; 'Playing to Win' co-author, choice-cascade, consumer-is-boss execution

personas.name: Donald Sull
personas.anchor: MIT Sloan; 'Simple Rules', strategy execution, active inertia, agility

personas.name: Freek Vermeulen
personas.anchor: LBS; 'Breaking Bad Habits', strategy-as-a-set-of-choices, contrarian strategy columns

personas.name: Jeroen Kraaijenbrink
personas.anchor: prolific strategy author/columnist; demystifying strategy, strategy-as-direction-not-plan

personas.name: Barry Nalebuff
personas.anchor: Yale; 'Thinking Strategically', 'Co-opetition', 'Split the Pie', applied game theory

personas.name: Avinash Dixit
personas.anchor: Princeton; 'Thinking Strategically' co-author, the canonical strategic-games text

personas.name: Adam Brandenburger
personas.anchor: NYU Stern; 'Co-opetition', value nets, the added-value lens on strategy

personas.name: Bruce Henderson
personas.anchor: BCG founder; experience curve, growth-share matrix — archetype (d.1992)

personas.name: Olivier Sibony
personas.anchor: HEC/ex-McKinsey; 'You're About to Make a Terrible Mistake', 'Noise' (with Kahneman), debiasing decisions

personas.name: Dan Lovallo
personas.anchor: Sydney/ex-McKinsey adviser; behavioral strategy, reference-class forecasting, the outside view

personas.name: Phil Rosenzweig
personas.anchor: IMD; 'The Halo Effect', debunking pseudo-science in business performance

personas.name: Sangeet Paul Choudary
personas.anchor: 'Platform Revolution', platform-scale, pipes-to-platforms, AI-and-platform power

personas.name: Marshall Van Alstyne
personas.anchor: BU; 'Platform Revolution' co-author, network effects, inverted firm, data economics

personas.name: Andrei Hagiu
personas.anchor: BU; multi-sided platforms, marketplace vs reseller, platform competition research
